source: SUS Pardubicky kraj E-ZAK targeted additions
notes: SUSPk E-ZAK is used as a second Pardubicky kraj authority source when APDOS has stale or misleading state.
The III/33742 Hostalovice / Brezinka rows were prompted by field observation that APDOS had not reflected the real finished surface state.

roads.title: Oprava silnice III/33742 Hošťalovice - křiž. III/33744 směr Nový Dvůr
roads.sourceNote: E-ZAK contract P24V00000156; APDOS listed a similar III/33742 item as preparation, but E-ZAK shows closed fulfillment and paid 2025 amount. Field observation says the fresh surface runs from the Březinka junction toward the airport, while the remaining Nový Dvůr intravilán section is not finished.

skipped.reason: Out of current 2020+ reconstruction window; E-ZAK shows contract fulfillment ended 30.11.2015.

skipped.title: Oprava silnice III/33742 Nový Dvůr - letiště Podhořany
skipped.reason: Current 2026 E-ZAK contract with planned May 2026 start and 45-day duration, but field observation says the Nový Dvůr intravilán section is not finished; keep as pending source material until official close-out or field verification.
